error_signature: Code node hangs or fails to execute scripts
title: Code node execution issues in n8n Cloud
symptom: The Code node in n8n Cloud hangs indefinitely or fails to execute simple scripts. This issue has been reported by multiple users.
not_this_if: Running n8n on a self-hosted instance
root_cause: The issue is likely related to environment variables like NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL, which cannot be modified by users on the n8n Cloud. This can lead to problems with executing external modules in the Code node.
fix_steps: Contact your workspace owner to update the n8n Cloud version
Ensure the version is updated to at least 1.116.1 beta
agent_instruction: Request an update to the n8n Cloud version from your workspace owner.
